'''ây-t-k-g''' ('''kayatkegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:channelise|channelise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:channelise|channelise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-t-k-g
|-
! Lemma
| kayatkegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyatkegoko|thiyatkegoko]] || [[word:jiyatkegoko|jiyatkegoko]] || [[word:shiyatkegoko|shiyatkegoko]] || [[word:kiyatkegoko|kiyatkegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyatkegoko|thuthuyatkegoko]] || [[word:jujuyatkegoko|jujuyatkegoko]] || [[word:shushuyatkegoko|shushuyatkegoko]] || [[word:kukuyatkegoko|kukuyatkegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyatkegoko|thuyatkegoko]] || [[word:juyatkegoko|juyatkegoko]] || [[word:shuyatkegoko|shuyatkegoko]] || [[word:kuyatkegoko|kuyatkegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyatkegoko|thuyatkegoko]] || [[word:juyatkegoko|juyatkegoko]] || [[word:shuyatkegoko|shuyatkegoko]] || [[word:kuyatkegoko|kuyatkegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyatkegoko|theyatkegoko]] || [[word:jeyatkegoko|jeyatkegoko]] || [[word:sheyatkegoko|sheyatkegoko]] || [[word:keyatkegoko|keyatkegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyatkegoko|thothoyatkegoko]] || [[word:jojoyatkegoko|jojoyatkegoko]] || [[word:shoshoyatkegoko|shoshoyatkegoko]] || [[word:kokoyatkegoko|kokoyatkegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyatkegoko|thoyatkegoko]] || [[word:joyatkegoko|joyatkegoko]] || [[word:shoyatkegoko|shoyatkegoko]] || [[word:koyatkegoko|koyatkegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyatkegoko|thoyatkegoko]] || [[word:joyatkegoko|joyatkegoko]] || [[word:shoyatkegoko|shoyatkegoko]] || [[word:koyatkegoko|koyatkegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyatkegoko|thĂŠyatkegoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyatkegoko|jĂŠyatkegoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyatkegoko|shĂŠyatkegoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyatkegoko|kĂŠyatkegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayatkegoko|thathayatkegoko]] || [[word:jajayatkegoko|jajayatkegoko]] || [[word:shashayatkegoko|shashayatkegoko]] || [[word:kakayatkegoko|kakayatkegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayatkegoko|thayatkegoko]] || [[word:jayatkegoko|jayatkegoko]] || [[word:shayatkegoko|shayatkegoko]] || [[word:kayatkegoko|kayatkegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayatkegoko|thayatkegoko]] || [[word:jayatkegoko|jayatkegoko]] || [[word:shayatkegoko|shayatkegoko]] || [[word:kayatkegoko|kayatkegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shayatkegithi|shayatkegithi]] || [[word:shayatkegiji|shayatkegiji]] || [[word:shayatkegishi|shayatkegishi]] || [[word:shayatkegiki|shayatkegiki]]
